message:
feat(python): numpy.testing.assert_array_equal wrapper parity (franken_numpy-69b1)

Adds a passthrough wrapper for numpy.testing.assert_array_equal
covering err_msg, verbose, and the strict kwarg. Exposed as
testing_assert_array_equal. Test covers identical (passes), different
content (raises with correct AssertionError type), shape mismatch
(raises), NaN positions match (passes by default), strict=False
default tolerating dtype difference, strict=True raising on dtype
mismatch, and custom err_msg appearing in raised text.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
